seoTitle: Ardlethan vs Argenton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ardlethan and Argenton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ardlethan and Argenton.
heading: Ardlethan vs Argenton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ardlethan, New South Wales and Argenton, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Argenton has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Ardlethan (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Ardlethan or Argenton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ardlethan has a flood risk score of 41/100, while Argenton scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ardlethan scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Argenton scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ardlethan or Argenton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Argenton has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
